title: Waifu Villagers
description: Now you can turn your villager into an anime waifu.
body:
# 100+ New Waifu
This resources pack changes the villagers, and also adds more than **100+** waifu, renaming the plains villagers using name tags!

## This texture pack requires:
- [OptiFine mod](https://optifine.net/home) for _forge_
- [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) and [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) mods for _fabric_
## World for testing
Google Drive -> [World](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/18RYoBhlUPrzgJGR94T6fCUSd1exIUgxA?usp=sharing)
